generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last crisis—imagine if they had even more tools to protect us. It's not about control, it's about being ready. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
